name: AIsa Tavily
description: Requires node, and AISA_API_KEY. Uses the supplied AISA_API_KEY to send requests to https://api.aisa.one. Native-first ClawHub plugin for `aisa-tavily`. Ships the packaged AIsa skill with an `openclaw.plugin.json` manifest and a Claude-compatible bundle fallback. Search the web and extract public page content through AIsa's Tavily-backed API relay. Use when: the user needs web search, source discovery, current news lookup, or public URL content extraction. Supports concise result sets, deeper research, and news-focused queries.

commands.name: aisa-tavily
commands.description: Search the web and extract public page content through AIsa's Tavily-backed API relay. Use when: the user needs web search, source discovery, current news lookup, or public URL content extraction. Supports concise result sets, deeper research, and news-focused queries.

AISA_API_KEY.title: Aisa Api Key
AISA_API_KEY.description: Provide AISA_API_KEY for the packaged AIsa skill runtime.

providerAuthChoices.choiceHint: Used only to authorize requests to the AIsa API service.
providerAuthChoices.cliDescription: AISA_API_KEY used by the packaged skill runtime.
